hypothesis: A shorter, punchier hero description focused on speed and outcome will outperform the current longer description, because reducing cognitive load above the fold increases conversion.

changes.hero_description: Instant coupon codes at Amazon, Walmart, Target & 1,000+ stores. Free. Private. Automatic.

rationale.hero_description: Current description is 30 words. This challenger is 14 words. Tests whether radical brevity — three adjectives as a rhythm ('Free. Private. Automatic.') — reduces friction and increases scannability for mobile users. Keeps the three key stores named for recognition.
